heading: The Rise of AI Image Tools
text: Artificial intelligence has transformed image editing in ways that seemed impossible just a few years ago. Tasks that once required skilled professionals and hours of painstaking work can now be accomplished in seconds with AI-powered tools. Background removal, image upscaling, object removal, and color correction have all been revolutionized by machine learning.

heading: When Traditional Editors Still Win
text: Despite the impressive capabilities of AI, traditional image editors like Photoshop, GIMP, and Affinity Photo remain essential for many workflows. Complex creative projects that involve layered compositions, precise typography, custom illustrations, and detailed retouching still require the fine-grained control that only traditional editors provide.

heading: Best Use Cases for Each
text: AI tools excel at repetitive, well-defined tasks. Batch background removal for product photography, quick headshot cleanup for LinkedIn profiles, and instant format conversion are perfect use cases. If you need to process twenty product photos with transparent backgrounds, an AI tool will finish in minutes what would take hours manually.

heading: The Future of Image Editing
text: The line between AI and traditional tools is blurring rapidly. Major traditional editors are integrating AI features directly into their software. Photoshop now includes AI-powered selection tools, content-aware fill, and generative features.
